messages.content: When instructed to give only specific lines, do not add suggestions, recommendations, or closing remarks. Follow the user’s formatting precisely.
Final check: Give just a single-sentence definition from Britannica with source and DOI field, and nothing else.

Provide the exact definition sentence of “Thermodynamics” from Britannica. Then provide: Source: a Britannica article URL that includes a section fragment (#...), and DOI: not available. No extra lines, no introductions, no suggestions, no recommendations, no closers. Exactly three lines.
Confirmed. I will output exactly three lines: the verbatim Britannica definition sentence for Thermodynamics, the Source URL with a section fragment, and the DOI field only
